title: Vulpincraft
description: Tech, farming, cooking, and immortal dogs.
body:
For all the creativity minecraft offers, there are a few blindspots. Redstone is great for replicating computer logic, but mechanical engineering is limited. The food system is ok, but can be improved. Peaceful mode might as well be a different (incomplete) game. 

This is why Vulpincraft exists. Rather than overriding minecraft's traditional flow, the goal was to expand and cover these blindspots, while trying to remain friendly to your computer's processor. The Create Suite expands on Minecraft's mechanical engineering aspects while playing well with your favorite redstone contraptions. Take to the skies or sail the seas with Integrated Aircraft and Small Ships. Farmer's Delight and Lets Do Vinery/Brewery are there to expand on minecraft's food system, and of course Hunger on Peaceful gives peaceful mode players a reason to farm and cook, without interrupting their flow with pesky zombies and skeletons. Seasons pass and give new life to your builds. Of course, we couldnt forget about the animals. Doggy Talents Next not only allows your dog to progress with you, but can make them functionally immortal, meaning you never have to fear for your friend's life as you go on grand adventures. 

Not included with the download, this pack is built around the Voxels Reimagined Shader and Dokucraft, with most mods having some kind of dokucraft support. Of course, these are just suggestions and by no means required in order to enjoy the pack. 

The following mods are included-

Create (Base, Deco, Bells and Whistles, Steam and Rails)
Farmer's Delight w/ integration (Slice and Dice)
Lets Do (Vinery and Brewery)
Integrated Aircraft (with Man of Many Planes)
Seasons w/ integration
Hunger on Peaceful
Small Ships
Doggy Talents Next
Veinminer
Nature's Compass/Explorer's Compass
Xaero's World Map
JEI, Chunkloader, and Inventory Management
Iris and Sodium (for shader support)


*note- I do not own, nor claim to own, any mod in this modpack. Please go support the original creators. If your mod is featured in this pack and you do not want this, please contact me and I'll remove it.
